text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day at the sporting goods store...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, I would like some assistance, please.
Could I get these, these, and those as well?

text_block_list.name: Shop Assistant
text_block_list.text:
Y-you want all of them?! I appreciate the
patronage, but are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course. They are all wonderful shoes that
exude the very souls of their makers.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You there, were you not also drawn here by these
captivating shoes?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I am, in fact, referring to you! Now tell me,
do you not have the urge to own every pair of
these beauties?
choice_data_list:
I don't think they'll all fit in your dorm's shoe
cabinet...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
My goodness, you are absolutely right! Groove
reprimanded me the other day for the very same
reason.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... While it pains me to do so, I must
restrain myself and only buy a single pair of
shoes.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
While I still have you here, what kind of shoes do
you think would be the best?
choice_data_list:
Ones that are lightweight so you can run fast in
them.

Ones that are heavy but will be great for
training.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I concur. It is not every day I buy new shoes,
and getting ones that enable me to run faster
would be a true delight.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Very well! Let us search for the lightest shoes in
this store!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And once I have them purchased, I challenge you
to a race! Hehe, I believe this will make for a
lovely memory. ♪
choice_data_list: I dunno about racing against an Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Now that is quite a shame. I thought it would be
good fun...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah! These shoes look quite light indeed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as she's paid for the shoes, Fine Motion
puts them on and runs off in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
How very intriguing. While heavy shoes may be
difficult to run in, I suppose they would be good
training aids.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Those shoes over there might fit the bill nicely.
Look, they're so big and heavy, simply walking in
them would be great fun!
choice_data_list:
I don't know if wearing them would be "fun,"
but okay...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Well, I have never worn such cumbersome shoes
before, and first-time experiences are always so
refreshing and wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That settles it. Excuse me! I would like those
shoes, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After purchasing her new shoes, Fine Motion puts
them on and walks off. Her gait may be awkward,
but her smile shines far brighter.
